description: Comments explain a domain constraint instead of narrating code.
stagedPatch:
diff --git a/src/billing.ts b/src/billing.ts
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/billing.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+export function billableMonth(date: Date) {
+  // Finance closes the month on the last New York business day, not UTC midnight.
+  // This mirrors the reconciliation export consumed by the billing provider.
+  // Keep this in local time so the generated invoice month matches the ledger.
+  // The provider rejects invoices whose service period crosses their close date.
+  return `${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}`;
+}
